title: Woolworths Limited - creating a new stapled security 2012
description: How to find out about updated tax consequences of participation in the 2012 Woolworths restructure.
keywords: Securities, Security, Restructuring, Woolworths, restructure, SCA, SCA Property Group, stapled securities, In-specie distribution, capital return, sale facility

content_blocks.text: This document contains information about the 2012 Woolworths Limited (Woolworths) restructure and creation of a new stapled security.
This information applies to you if:

items: you are an individual, not a company or trust
you are an Australian resident for tax purposes
you held ordinary shares in Woolworths on 30 November 2012 (record date)
you hold your shares as an investment asset, not as trading stock as part of carrying on a business to make a short-term or one-off commercial gain.

content_blocks.text: If you acquired your shares under an employee share scheme (ESS), this information only applies to you if the shares have been taxed under the ESS rules.

content_text:
## Introduction
This document contains information about the 2012 Woolworths Limited (Woolworths) restructure and creation of a new stapled security.
This information applies to you if:
- you are an individual, not a company or trust
- you are an Australian resident for tax purposes
- you held ordinary shares in Woolworths on 30 November 2012 (record date)
- you hold your shares as an investment asset, not as trading stock as part of carrying on a business to make a short-term or one-off commercial gain.
If you acquired your shares under an employee share scheme (ESS), this information only applies to you if the shares have been taxed under the ESS rules.

child_links.title: What happened?
child_links.description: A restructure of Woolworths was implemented on 11 December 2012.

child_links.title: In-specie distribution
child_links.description: You received units in SCA Property Management Trust and SCA Property Retail Trust and not cash.

child_links.title: Cost base of your Woolworths shares
child_links.description: Work out the cost base of your Woolworths shares.

child_links.title: Cost base of new units
child_links.description: The initial cost base of each SCA Property Group stapled security you received under the distribution is $1.4397.

child_links.title: Acquisition date
child_links.description: This applies whether you acquired the stapled securities under the distribution or the offer.

child_links.title: Shares sold before 11 December 2012
child_links.description: If you owned Woolworths shares on 30 November 2012 but sold them before 11 December 2012.
